title: OpenAI API key exposed
description: OpenAI secret key hardcoded in source

title: AWS access key exposed
description: AWS access key ID hardcoded in source
remediation: Move to environment variable + rotate key

title: GitHub token exposed
remediation: Move to environment variable + revoke token

title: Slack bot token exposed
description: Slack bot token hardcoded in source
remediation: Move to environment variable + revoke token

title: Google API key exposed
description: Google API key hardcoded in source

title: HIGH
remediation: Secret or token hardcoded in source

title: NEXT_PUBLIC_ exposes secret
description: Secret exposed to browser via NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix

title: Supabase service role key exposed to client
description: Service role key is admin-level and must never reach the browser
remediation: Rename to server-only env var immediately

title: Secret in comment
description: Credential or key value left in code comment
remediation: Remove comment; use env var reference
